Spoilor warning for like Tokyo Ghoul if you haven't watched it you should. Thanks for 70 followers by the way

Yeah uh part two, I guess. I love Tokyo ghoul and I don't care what anyone says Tokyo Ghoul Re: was good. Also uh I can't really explain the scenario but like.
You have been friends with Kimiko even after knowing she was a Ghoul and because of that you would often see her with other Ghouls. And then she got kidnaped.

Yeah I don't really know how to explain it but just know it's cannon to the manga/anime but it's more of the manga side because of how long she was tortured... yeah just watch Tokyo Ghoul. I'll have the events in like the backstory and personality but I'm not adding it I guess. I'm to lazy to do that and after all this is a triple upload and I may make another bot today.
